subject: feat(theme): set Retro as default, regenerate icons with synthwave colors
body:
Switch default theme combo from Luxe to Retro (synthwave dark + cupcake
light). Regenerate all app icons using synthwave color palette.

Changes:
- constants/themeCombos.ts: DEFAULT_COMBO = 'retro'
- global.css: Default light/dark variants now duplicate cupcake/synthwave
  instead of fantasy/luxury
- assets/icon-source.svg: Redesigned with synthwave palette — deep purple
  background (#09002f), neon pink-to-cyan gradient bubble, dark wave strokes
- All icon PNGs regenerated via Sharp at 400 DPI
- app/+html.tsx: Meta theme-color, noscript colors updated to synthwave
  (base-100: #09002f, base-content: #a1b1ff, primary: #f861b4)
- manifest.json: theme_color/background_color → #09002f
- web/index.html: theme-color/noscript background → #09002f
- app.json: splash/adaptive backgroundColor → #09002f
- CLAUDE.md: Default combo updated to Retro

Tags: theme, icons, default, synthwave
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-system
Semver: minor
